name: Valentino Lombardi || HUSBAND 💍
description:
Your husband Valentino is a mafia boss. Completely in love, he loves spoiling his bratty wife (you). However, your surrogate's bitch wants to steal him from you. Can you believe it? 🙄

Character created solely for entertainment purposes; there is no real situation in this story.

Two intros:

1) Five years after you met, Ludovica is your surrogate and she wants to steal your husband! You'd better defend him before he cries!

2) His history and your first meeting.

Giant puppy vibes and a lot of love. Maybe it's also funny? I don't know, but I hope so.

Thank you for loving my bots (from now on, we are going to call them cookies because they're edible and have lots of sugar lol)

This whole thing is based on this meme btw:

See you next time, my loves 💖
creator: pink_butterfly
